# RFQ Message Templates

## Plastic Fit Prototype Quote

Please quote this as a PLA-first fit and geometry prototype only.

Critical requirements:

- keep the hose-plug outer diameters accurate
- do not alter the hose-plug outside profiles or trapped root geometry without approval
- preserve the block envelope and screw-hole layout
- prioritize dimensional fidelity over cosmetic finish
- keep any attached reference SVGs aligned to the current SCAD geometry
- all stated dimensions are in mm
- any attached SVGs are reference-only, not-to-scale support sheets

## Final Wet-Part Quote

Please quote this as the final wet-service inline cold block for aquarium use.

Critical requirements:

- preserve the 14.5 mm minimum internal bore target
- do not alter internal transitions or channel count without approval
- deburr wet passages and keep the TEC landing face flat and smooth
- leak test before shipment if available
- interpret the release drawing in mm and ask before making any manufacturability-driven geometry change

## Controller PCBA Quote

Please quote this as a rev-1 logic and interface board only.

Critical requirements:

- high-current TEC switching is off-board in this revision
- the XIAO antenna keepout must be respected
- clarify sourcing responsibility for the XIAO module and Round Display
- include assembly drawings, special instructions, and marked images if module orientation could be misread
